english translation text: The lion of God, the son-in-law of the prophet

urdu transliteration text: Shafa e mehshar, saaqi e kauthar
english translation text: The intercessor on the day of judgement, the quencher of thirst at Kauthar

urdu transliteration text: Bolna Maine Jub Seekha Tha, Maan Ne Meri Yeh Mujhse Kaha Tha
english translation text: When I began to talk, my mother had told me

urdu transliteration text:
Bolo Beta Jaan Laga Kar
Haider
Haider Haider
english translation text: My dear, say this with all your strength

urdu transliteration text: Meri Wasiyat Yaad Yeh Rakhna, Qabr Ke Bahar Tum Sub Kehna
english translation text: This is my will, remember, that outside my grave all of you shall say...

urdu transliteration text: Khud Main Kahunga Kabr Ke Andar
english translation text: ...and I will say from inside my grave

urdu transliteration text: Dono Hai Yeh Ruh E Wilayat, Dono Hai Yeh Jaan E Wilayat
english translation text: This is the soul of Wilayah, this is the life of Wilayah
Allah is Great, Allah is Great

Zikre Ali (A.s.) Par Pabandi Thi, Lekin Zainab (S.a.) Aaise Boli
There was a restriction on the zikr of Ali, but Zainab spoke in such a manner

urdu transliteration text: Mesum se yeh mujhko mili hai, maine kitab ishq parhi hai
english translation text: I learnt this from Maytham, I have read the book of love
The first lesson in this book is

urdu transliteration text:
Maut Se Darta Hai Na Dara Hai
Ishq Takallum Bol Raha Hai
english translation text: He has never been afraid, the love of Takallum (poet’s name) is saying

urdu transliteration text: Daar Ke Upar Zer E Khanjar
english translation text: On top of a tree (like Maytham) or under a sword
